optionName: Nvidia GeForce RTX 2070 Super Founders Edition
detailedDescription:
More cores than the 2080 at a lower price — a landmark value card.
Excellent 1440p performance with strong ray tracing capabilities.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: TU104 | Architecture: Turing
CUDA Cores: 2560 | RT Cores: 40 | Tensor Cores: 320
VRAM: 8GB GDDR6 (256-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 448 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4, 1x HDMI 2.0, 1x USB-C (VirtualLink)
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 3.0)
Recommended PSU: 650W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
